arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sent new warning as fresh hint Arsenal striker transfer is already completed
arts.sum: Signing a new striker is Arsenal's top priority for the summer transfer window, with the lack of a top-class forward having scuppered the Gunners' hopes of winning the title

arts.ttl: Arsenal ready to rip up summer transfer plans with question marks over two players
arts.sum: Arsenal have struggled with a raft of injury problems this season and manager Mikel Arteta has revealed they are also having an effect on the club's plans for the summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Liverpool star left training in tears after Arsenal bid and late transfer U-turn
arts.sum: Luis Suarez was the subject of an infamous £40m and £1 bid from Arsenal in the summer of 2013, but was talked into staying at Liverpool by Steven Gerrard

arts.ttl: LIVE: Arteta leaves out Arsenal's Saka, Ødegaard for Everton trip
arts.sum: That Arsenal starting XI suggests Mikel Arteta has one eye firmly on Real Madrid. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer major blow to sign ‘fantastic’ striker as new club enters the race
arts.sum: Arsenal are expected to be one of the busiest clubs in the summer transfer window. The Gunners are once again on the verge of losing out on the Premier League title and questions have been raised about the quality and the depth of their squad. Transfer news expert Fabrizio Romano has already confirmed that the […] The post Arsenal suffer major blow to sign ‘fantastic’ striker as new club enters the race appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops huge Arsenal team selection hint for Real Madrid with Gabriel replacement
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has dropped a huge hint over his preferred replacement for Gabriel Magalhaes with his team selected for Saturday's Premier League game with Everton. In the first game since Gabriel suffered his injury, Arteta handed a start to Kiwior for the first time in the Premier League since the 1-1 draw at Fulham.

arts.ttl: Everton v Arsenal team news: Saka, Martinelli + Timber all subs

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man Utd in ‘very interested’ in Argentine sensation compared to Bernardo Silva
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are among the teams said to be “very interested” in River Plate sensation Ian Subiabre, a teenager compared to Manchester City star Bernardo Silva . Ian Subiabre: The next Julian Alvarez or Bernardo Silva?

arts.ttl: Arsenal starting lineup to face Everton confirmed as shock Martin Odegaard, Raheem Sterling calls made
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard drops to the bench for Saturday's Premier League clash with Everton, while Raheem Sterling starts in attack.

arts.ttl: Everton v Arsenal: Premier League – live
